CustomField.description: Controls whether NPPatch automatically creates a Payment record when a new Opportunity is created. When enabled, a single Payment is created matching the Opportunity amount and close date. Excluded Record Types and Types configured in the payment exclusion settings are skipped. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically create a Payment record when a new Opportunity is created. Payment exclusion settings still apply.
CustomField.label: Automatic Payment Creation
